title: DG Fuels Appoints Samsung E&A as Contractor for SAF Project in St. James
content: DG Fuels LLC announced its appointment of Samsung E&A as a major contractor for its inaugural synthetic jet fuel project in St. James Parish, Louisiana. Samsung E&A will handle responsibilities for the blue hydrogen, green hydrogen, and power generation portions of the approximately $8 billion synthetic jet fuel project. The parties have signed a term sheet, and Samsung E&A is expected to begin the FEED for its dedicated portion before the end of 2025. In this role, Samsung E&A will collaborate with Black & Veatch, which is the contractor for the balance of the project and the overall integrator. Preliminary discussions are also underway regarding potentially extending the relationship to follow-on projects in Minnesota and Nebraska. The St. James Project, which will produce approximately 200 million gallons of jet fuel per year, is targeting a final investment decision in the third quarter of 2026.
author: Analysts Account
